headline: Berkshire Hathaway’s new CEO just made a move Buffett never did
summary: Greg Abel has been CEO of Berkshire Hathaway for barely three months. In that time, he has restarted share buybacks, invested his entire salary in company stock, and put $1.8 billion into a Japanese insurance giant, and those moves got attention. His latest decision goes somewhere Warren Buffett ...

headline: Travelers Cos. Inc. (NYSE:TRV) Shows Strong Technical Setup for Potential Breakout
summary: TRV stock shows strong technical momentum and a high-quality consolidation pattern, presenting a potential breakout setup for technical investors.
